memory.summary: I have a free afternoon before the term project deadline, but I am stressed and sleep-deprived. A quick chore or leisure activity is available to address my current state.
The quick chore boosted my progress slightly, but I remain sleep-deprived and stressed with limited energy.
The small chore gave a minor progress boost, but the afternoon is slipping away while I remain sleep-deprived and stressed.
The trivial chore provided a minor progress boost, yet my sleep debt and stress remain unchanged despite the late afternoon timing.
This hour of work on a trivial chore further increased my progress, yet my sleep debt and stress levels remain unchanged.
I made minor progress on a trivial chore, but my sleep debt and stress remain unchanged despite the late hour.
After 0.5 hours of work, my progress on the trivial chore rose slightly to 0.41, yet my sleep debt and stress levels remain unchanged.
I made minor progress on the trivial chore, but my sleep debt and stress levels remain unchanged despite working late.
I spent another half-hour on the trivial chore, inching progress to 0.44, yet my sleep debt and stress remain stubbornly high.
Despite working two hours, the trivial chore finished unfinished right at its deadline, leaving me with only 50% progress.
I made a tiny 0.03 progress increment on the chore at 23:00, but my energy is critically low and stress remains high.
I gained a tiny 0.02 progress increment on the trivial chore, but my energy is now zero and stress remains critically high.
